\tzpentry{ID11397}{Total Stress-Energy Phase Decomposition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The effective total stress-energy is decomposed into ordinary, topological-current, breathing, and interface contributions.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
T^{\mathrm{total}}_{\mu\nu}=T^{b}_{\mu\nu}+T^{T}_{\mu\nu}+T^{E}_{\mu\nu}+T^{\mathrm{interface}}_{\mu\nu}
